Localization.Description: A user interacts with Office documents using cmd.exe or PowerShell

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} interacts with Office document set ({alert.regex_match}) using {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} interacts with Office document "{alert.regex_match}" using {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
